name: Pasta with Seafood
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Baccala (dried salt cod), cut into pieces, rinsed and soaked in plenty of cold water for at least 12 hours, changing the water a few times during soaking. Drain well.
3/4 pound Littleneck or cherrystone clams, rinsed and drained, ensuring all shells are tightly closed and free of mud
3/4 pound Mussels - beards removed, rinsed and drained, ensuring all shells are tightly closed and free of mud
1/2 pound Squid, cleaned and cut into 1/2-inch rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the baccala several times and soak it in plenty of cold water for at least 12 hours, changing the water a few times during soaking. Drain well.
2. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook the penne or linguine pasta until al dente, then drain and set aside.
3. In another large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
4. Add white wine and tomato sauce. Simmer gently, covered, for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the soaked baccala, clams, mussels, crab claws, fresh cod, shrimp, and squid. Cover and simmer until clams and mussels just begin to open (about 2-3 minutes).
6. Add cooked pasta to the seafood mixture and toss gently. Discard any unopened shellfish.
7. This recipe serves 8 to 10 as a main course.
